dossier.overview:
**Partner idle behaviour** covers Pokémon **attached to the player**: pathfinding follow while the player moves, and **Nature-weighted idle actions** when the player stands still (circle, poke, sleep, explore near the player).

This is **not** free-roam NPC AI. Partners do not wander the map picking smart-object offers. They use `FollowerController` and `NatureIdlePlanner`, not `MapPokemonSimulation`.

A shipped prototype exists on the 3D test map. See also the **Overworld NPC AI** idea for guest, staff, and trainer actors that decide what to do on their own.

blocks.html:
SystemTriggerWhat it decides
Partner idle behaviour (this idea)Player stands still for N secondsNature-weighted idle action near the player
Overworld NPC AIDecision interval on a hot mapActivity offers from zones, smart objects, social targets

blocks.body: Shared concept only: **planner picks, executor runs primitives**. Partners must not grow into the general overworld brain. Free-roam actors must not reuse `FollowerController` as their main loop.

sections.title: Shipped prototype
sections.summary: RESORT 3D TEST: summon, follow, Nature idle.

blocks.caption: Partner on the overworld 3D test map
blocks.body: Single companion behind the player. When the player stops, idle behaviours start after `startAfterIdleSeconds` (default 5 s). Player movement cancels idle and runs `cancel_return` pathfind back to the player.

blocks.title: Idle behaviour pipeline
blocks.caption: Planning vs execution (partner only)
blocks.source:
flowchart LR
    CFG["idle_behaviours.json"] --> PLAN["NatureIdlePlanner"]
    SESS["session.json nature"] --> PLAN
    PLAN -->|IdlePlan actions| EXEC["FollowerController"]
    EXEC -->|MovePath Face Wait| WORLD["Grid pathfinding"]
    EXEC -->|Poke Jump Sleep| ANIM["Sprite and VFX"]

blocks.caption: Session config: species, nature, optional forced behaviour for testing

sections.title: Nature groups
sections.summary: Same Nature groups bias idle action weights.

blocks.html:
GroupNaturesIdle bias
AssertiveLonely, Brave, Adamant, NaughtyApproach, guard, independent motion
SteadyBold, Relaxed, Impish, LaxRest, stay near player, slow wander
CuriousModest, Mild, Quiet, RashInspect, explore radius
ComposedCalm, Gentle, Sassy, CarefulObserve, deliberate motion
EnergeticTimid, Hasty, Jolly, NaivePlay, chase, jump
NeutralHardy, Docile, Serious, Bashful, QuirkyBalanced default

Weights live in config/gameplay/followers/idle_behaviours.json. Free-roam NPC AI will reuse the same Nature tables for activity offer scoring, not this idle planner.

sections.title: Future extensions
sections.summary: Still player-attached; still not free-roam AI.

blocks.body:
Possible later work that stays in this idea:

• Multiple partner slots (up to 6) with follow formation
• Temporary ask-to-follow bubble and release hotkey (becomes guest on current map when released)
• Partner interaction, affection, talking, minigames

When a temporary partner is **released**, it hands off to **Overworld NPC AI** as a `guest_on_map` actor on that map.
